what_this_is: Per-write cost of the synchronous HITL enforcement path: sidecar-state ContextVar read, per-cycle write floor, per-tenant daily quota incr, and running cost-cap check. This is the safety machinery the runner runs before every write is queued for human approval — pure in-process control flow, no I/O.
what_this_is_not: The human approval round-trip (minutes-to-hours, human-bound, measured separately as hitl_round_trip). Nor the production policy thresholds or the real per-tenant store (mocked to an in-process counter here so the bench needs no network).
